description: Update sovereign collect name from Queen to Sovereign
Update sovereign collect text from Queen Elizabeth to King Charles
old:
Almighty God, fountain of all goodness, bless our Sovereign
Lady, Queen Elizabeth, and all who are in authority under her;
that they may order all things in wisdom and equity,
righteousness and peace, to the honour of your name, and the
good of your Church and people; through Jesus Christ our Lord.
new:
Almighty God, fountain of all goodness, bless our Sovereign
Lord, King Charles, and all who are in authority under him;
that they may order all things in wisdom and equity,
righteousness and peace, to the honour of your name, and the
good of your Church and people; through Jesus Christ our Lord.

description: Correct p.412 feast name: extractor picked up Canada Day heading (bottom of page) instead of Saint Peter and Saint Paul (whose collect appears at top of same page)
new: Saint Peter and Saint Paul 29 June

description: Correct p.412 feast date to match Saint Peter and Saint Paul
Correct p.413 feast name: extractor picked up Saint Thomas heading (bottom of page) instead of Canada Day (whose collect appears at top of same page)
Correct p.413 feast date to match Canada Day
Restore word spaces on p.356 (pdfplumber 26.04.0 concatenates words for this page)
old:
AlmightyGod,
yourSonrevealedinsignsandmiracles
thewonderofyoursavinglove.
Renewyourpeoplewithyourheavenlygrace,
andinallourweakness
sustainusbyyourmightypower;
throughJesusChristourLord,
whoisaliveandreignswithyouandtheHolySpirit,
oneGod,nowandforever.
new:
Almighty God,
your Son revealed in signs and miracles
the wonder of your saving love.
Renew your people with your heavenly grace,
and in all our weakness
sustain us by your mighty power;
through Jesus Christ our Lord,
who is alive and reigns with you and the Holy Spirit,
one God, now and for ever.

description: Restore word spaces on p.358 (pdfplumber 26.04.0 concatenates words for this page)
old:
AlmightyGod,
grantustheSpirittothinkanddoalways
thosethingsthatareright,
thatwewhocandonothinggoodwithoutyou,
mayliveaccordingtoyourholywill;
throughJesusChristourLord,
wholivesandreignswithyouandtheHolySpirit,
oneGod,nowandforever.
new:
Almighty God,
grant us the Spirit to think and do always
those things that are right,
that we who can do nothing good without you,
may live according to your holy will;
through Jesus Christ our Lord,
who lives and reigns with you and the Holy Spirit,
one God, now and for ever.

description: Remove spurious blank lines on p.392 caused by running page-number and section-header stripping across a page break
old:
Almighty God,
you sent your Son Jesus Christ



to be the light of the world.
Free us from all that darkens and ensnares us,
and bring us to eternal light and joy;
through the power of him
who is alive and reigns with you and the Holy Spirit,
one God, now and for ever.
new:
Almighty God,
you sent your Son Jesus Christ
to be the light of the world.
Free us from all that darkens and ensnares us,
and bring us to eternal light and joy;
through the power of him
who is alive and reigns with you and the Holy Spirit,
one God, now and for ever.

description: Restore missing space on p.432 Common of a Martyr: 'servantN' → 'servant N'
old:
Almighty God,
who gave your servantN courage
to confess Jesus Christ
and to die for this faith,
may we always be ready
to give a reason for the hope that is in us,
and to suffer gladly for his sake;
through Jesus Christ our Lord,
who lives and reigns with you and the Holy Spirit,
one God, now and for ever.
new:
Almighty God,
who gave your servant N courage
to confess Jesus Christ
and to die for this faith,
may we always be ready
to give a reason for the hope that is in us,
and to suffer gladly for his sake;
through Jesus Christ our Lord,
who lives and reigns with you and the Holy Spirit,
one God, now and for ever.

description: Restore word spaces on p.396 (pdfplumber 26.04.0 concatenates words for this page)
old:
Creatorofthefruitfulearth,
youmadeusstewardsofallthings.
Giveusgratefulheartsforallyourgoodness,
andsteadfastwillstouseyourbountywell,
thatthewholehumanfamily,
todayandingenerationstocome,
maywithusgivethanksfortherichesofyourcreation.
WeaskthisinthenameofJesusChristtheLord.
new:
Creator of the fruitful earth,
you made us stewards of all things.
Give us grateful hearts for all your goodness,
and steadfast wills to use your bounty well,
that the whole human family,
today and in generations to come,
may with us give thanks for the riches of your creation.
We ask this in the name of Jesus Christ the Lord.
